overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dense forest during a heavy nighttime rainstorm. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring a narrow dirt path winding through tall trees with dense undergrowth, rendered with atmospheric fog and rain effects.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night during heavy rainfall. Tall deciduous trees flank both sides of the path, their trunks barely visible in the low light, while dense undergrowth lines the trail edges. The scene is completely devoid of other people or vehicles, creating an isolated, atmospheric environment typical of a survival horror or exploration game.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic, rain-drenched forest at night. It begins by advancing steadily along a narrow dirt trail, where the heavy rainfall blurs the surrounding environment. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the low light barely illuminates the tall deciduous trees and dense undergrowth flanking the path. The scene maintains a sense of oppressive isolation, moving further into the atmospheric darkness of the uninhabited wilderness.
